flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lake Superior College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lake Superior College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (19.8% → 25.4%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lake Superior College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.5k → $12.8k).
